data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation call.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation for the persona scenario is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring. This is supported by the failure message stating that no LLM assessment is available due to the evaluator execution not being possible. As a result, the outcome of the scenario cannot be determined, leading to an inconclusive verdict.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
